productName: Const Rosin AIO Hype 2.0 Device Rambutan 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Rambutan oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Simple, smooth, portable, with notes of ammonia, pineapple, and mango, leading into a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
